query_title: And Now for Something Completely Different

recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: A Fish Called Wanda
recommendations.overview: While a diamond advocate attempts to steal a collection of diamonds, troubles arise when he realises he’s not the only one after the collection.

recommendations.title: Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon Eternal the Movie Part 1
recommendations.overview: After a total solar eclipse, a dark circus troupe appears, Mamoru is stricken with a mysterious malady and bad things start happening across the city.  Sequel to the Sailor Moon Crystal TV series.

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.

recommendations.title: The Making of The Walking Dead
recommendations.overview: The Making of the TV Series The Walking Dead.

recommendations.title: Bringing Up Baby
recommendations.overview: David Huxley is waiting to get a bone he needs for his museum collection. Through a series of strange circumstances, he meets Susan Vance, and the duo have a series of misadventures which include a leopard called Baby.

recommendations.title: The Flight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: A young reindeer named Niko dreams about flying like his father, whom he has never met. Despite constant teasing from others, he sneaks out of his home valley to take flying lessons from Julius, a flying squirrel.

recommendations.title: Big Top Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and the gang hear of a werewolf plaguing a traveling circus, they go undercover as circus performers to get to the bottom.

recommendations.title: InAPPropriate Comedy
recommendations.overview: A no-nonsense cop has a flair for fashion and a celebrity takes revenge on the paparazzi in a collection of comedic sketches.

recommendations.title: Scooby Goes Hollywood
recommendations.overview: Shaggy and Scooby-Doo quit their Saturday morning TV series in pursuit of Hollywood stardom.
